---
title: "help_page_4"
author: "Edward"
date: "2025-03-04"
output: html_document
---

<div style="color:green; ">
General Usage:
</div>

- Use Chrome or Firefox for best performance
- Desktop/laptop recommended for full visualisation
- Allow 1–5 seconds for plots to load
<!-- - Hover over plots for interactive tooltips -->


<div style="color:green; ">
Data Selection:
</div>

- Select specific regions for detailed analysis
- Compare multiple regions by switching selections
- Use the full date range (2012–2023) for comprehensive trends


<div style="color:green; ">
Interpreting Results:
</div>

- Higher R² and deviance explained values indicate a better model fit (closer to 100%)
- Significant p-values (< 0.05) indicate important predictors
- Seasonal patterns reveal peak malaria months



---
